nasb.text: and when they had gone aside, they began talking to one another, saying, “This man is not doing anything worthy of death or imprisonment.”

esv.text: And when they had withdrawn, they said to one another, “This man is doing nothing to deserve death or imprisonment.”

cnv.text: 退到一邊，彼此談論，說：“這個人並沒有犯過甚麼該死該綁的罪。”

ccb.text: 走到一边商量说：“这人没有做什么该判死刑或监禁的事。”

csbs.text: 当离开的时候，彼此谈论说：“这个人没有做任何该死或该被捆锁的事。”
